Google Play is founded
subtitle: Digital software distribution platform from Google
fact: Google Play, also known as the Google Play Store or Play Store, and formerly known as the Android Market, is a digital distribution service operated and developed by Google.

title: Coca-Cola is founded
subtitle: Carbonated brown-colored soft drink
fact: Coca-Cola, or Coke, is a cola soft drink manufactured by the Coca-Cola Company.

title: Saudi Aramco is founded
subtitle: Saudi Arabian state-owned petroleum company
fact: Saudi Aramco, officially the Saudi Arabian Oil Company, is a majority state-owned petroleum and natural gas company, it is the national oil company of Saudi Arabia.

title: Mercedes-Benz is founded
subtitle: German automobile brand owned by Mercedes-Benz AG
fact: Mercedes-Benz, commonly referred to simply as Mercedes and occasionally as Benz, is a German automotive brand that was founded in 1926.

title: Toyota is founded
subtitle: Japanese multinational automotive manufacturer
fact: Toyota Motor Corporation is a Japanese multinational automotive manufacturer headquartered in Toyota City, Aichi, Japan.

title: Red Bull is founded
subtitle: Brand of energy drinks sold by Red Bull GmbH
fact: Red Bull is a brand of energy drinks created and owned by the Austrian company Red Bull GmbH.

title: BYD Auto is founded
subtitle: Chinese automobile manufacturer
fact: BYD Auto Co., Ltd. is the automotive subsidiary of BYD Company, a publicly listed Chinese multinational manufacturing company.

title: Starbucks is founded
subtitle: American multinational coffee company
fact: Starbucks Corporation is an American multinational chain of coffeehouses and roastery reserves headquartered in Seattle, Washington.

title: Sony Group is founded
subtitle: Japanese multinational conglomerate corporation
fact: Sony Group Corporation, commonly referred to as Sony, is a Japanese multinational conglomerate headquartered at Sony City in Minato, Tokyo, Japan.

title: Guinness is founded
subtitle: Irish brand of beer
fact: Guinness is a stout that originated in the brewery of Arthur Guinness at St.

title: Labubu is founded
subtitle: Brand of collectible plush toys
fact: Labubu is a line of collectible plush toys created by Hong Kong illustrator Kasing Lung.

title: Lego is founded
subtitle: Construction toy
fact: Lego is a brand of plastic construction toys manufactured by the Lego Group, a privately held company based in Billund, Denmark.

title: Ferrari is founded
subtitle: Italian luxury sports car manufacturer
fact: Ferrari S.p.A. is an Italian luxury sports car manufacturer based in Maranello, Italy.

title: Shell is founded
subtitle: British multinational oil and gas company
fact: Shell plc is a British multinational oil and gas company, headquartered in London, England.

title: Volkswagen is founded
subtitle: German automotive brand; manufacturing subsidiary of Volkswagen Group
fact: Volkswagen is a German automobile manufacturer based in Wolfsburg, Lower Saxony, Germany.

title: Aldi is founded
subtitle: Brand name of two global discount supermarket chains
fact: Aldi is the common company brand name of two German multinational family-owned discount supermarket chains operating over 13,500 stores in 18 countries.

title: KFC is founded
subtitle: American fast food restaurant chain specializing in fried chicken
fact: KFC Corporation, doing business as KFC, is an American multinational fast food restaurant chain specializing in Southern fried chicken and chicken sandwiches.

title: 7-Eleven is founded
subtitle: American convenience store chain
fact: 7-Eleven, Inc. is an American convenience store chain, headquartered in Irving, Texas.

title: Jägermeister is founded
subtitle: German digestif
fact: Jägermeister stylized as "Jägermeiſter", is a German spiced digestif liqueur.

title: Dr Pepper is founded
subtitle: Carbonated soft drink
fact: Dr Pepper is a carbonated soft drink created in the 1880s by American pharmacist Charles Alderton in Waco, Texas.

title: ExxonMobil is founded
subtitle: American multinational oil and gas corporation
fact: Exxon Mobil Corporation is an American multinational oil and gas corporation headquartered in Spring, Texas, a suburb of Houston.

title: Monster Energy is founded
subtitle: American energy drink
fact: Monster Energy is a brand of energy drinks that was created by Hansen Natural Company in April 2002 and released to the public with its original flavor on April 18, 2002.

title: Calvin Klein is founded
subtitle: American fashion house
fact: Calvin Klein Inc. is an American designer fashion retail chain marketing its eponymously branded products worldwide.

title: Barbie is founded
subtitle: Fashion doll brand and media franchise
fact: Barbie is a fashion doll franchise created by American businesswoman Ruth Handler, manufactured by American toy and entertainment company Mattel and introduced on March 9, 1959.

title: Hyundai Motor Company is founded
subtitle: South Korean multinational automaker
fact: Hyundai Motor Company, often referred to as Hyundai Motors (Korean: 현대자동차) and commonly known as Hyundai, is a South Korean multinational automotive manufacturer headquartered in Seoul, South Korea, which was founded in 1967.

title: Target Corporation is founded
subtitle: American retailer and supermarket chain
fact: Target Corporation, doing business as Target, is an American retail corporation headquartered in Minneapolis, Minnesota, United States.

title: Pepsi is founded
subtitle: Soft drink owned and manufactured by PepsiCo
fact: Pepsi is a carbonated soft drink with a cola flavor, manufactured by PepsiCo which serves as its flagship product.

title: Nissan is founded
subtitle: Japanese automobile manufacturer
fact: Nissan Motor Co., Ltd. is a Japanese multinational automobile manufacturer headquartered in Yokohama, Kanagawa, Japan.

title: The Home Depot is founded
subtitle: American multinational home improvement supplies retailing company
fact: The Home Depot, Inc., often referred to as Home Depot, is an American multinational home improvement retail corporation which sells tools, construction products, appliances, and services including fuel and transportation rentals.

title: UNIQLO is founded
subtitle: Japanese casual wear designer, manufacturer and retailer
fact: Uniqlo Co., Ltd. is a Japanese designer and retailer specializing in fast fashion, with a focus on casual wear.

title: Rubik's Cube is founded
subtitle: 3-D combination puzzle with many different permutations
fact: The Rubik's Cube is a 3D combination puzzle invented in 1974 by Hungarian sculptor and professor of architecture Ernő Rubik.

title: ByteDance is founded
subtitle: Chinese Internet and technology company
fact: ByteDance is a Chinese internet technology company headquartered in Haidian, Beijing.

title: Indian Institutes of Technology is founded
subtitle: Group of autonomous Indian public engineering institutes
fact: The Indian Institutes of Technology (IITs) are a network of prestigious, autonomous public engineering and technology institutions in India.

title: Chevrolet is founded
subtitle: American automobile division of GM
fact: Chevrolet is an American automobile division of the manufacturer General Motors (GM).

title: Mazda is founded
subtitle: Japanese multinational automaker
fact: Mazda Motor Corporation is a Japanese multinational automotive manufacturer headquartered in Fuchū, Hiroshima, Japan.

title: A&W Restaurants is founded
subtitle: American fast food chain
fact: A&W Concentrate Company, doing business as A&W Restaurants, or simply A&W, is an American fast food restaurant chain distinguished by its "Burger Family" combos, draft root beer and root beer floats.

title: Volvo Cars is founded
subtitle: Automotive brand manufacturing subsidiary of Geely
fact: Volvo Car AB, trading as Volvo Cars, is a Swedish multinational manufacturer of luxury vehicles.
